text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I step into my office to find it packed
with totally unfamiliar exercise equipment.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well... I've gone over my target weight recently,
so I started looking into exercise equipment. It
turns out there's a wider variety than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I figured I may as well try all of them, so I bought
the whole kit and caboodle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's try this one out first. It vibrates your
stomach via electric shock!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what would happen if we tried it
somewhere else. Let's try it on your cheeks!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Hehe, this zero-gravity treadmill is so
cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond ends up getting back to her
target weight while playing with her new exercise
equipment.
